fields.runtime_winner: live symbolic owner chosen by the current engine
fields.runtime_family_proxy: shadow-family proxy mapped from the runtime winner
fields.shadow_predicted_family: top allowlisted family from the shadow ranker
fields.confidence: margin-based confidence score from the bounded ranker
fields.pilot_enabled: whether a live pilot is configured on
fields.kill_switch: whether the pilot is force-disabled regardless of enabled flag
fields.override_eligible: whether the candidate would qualify for override under current guardrails
fields.override_applied: always false until a reviewed live pilot is explicitly enabled
fields.candidate_override_family: family that would be chosen if a future pilot were live
fields.block_reason: why the runtime winner was preserved

guardrails: This log does not imply any live owner override.
No answer-generation changes are driven by these events.
The control plane is scoped to one configured surface at a time.
